root_text.an8.64:1.1: Ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā gayāyaṁ viharati gayāsīse.
root_text.an8.64:1.3: “pubbāhaṁ, bhikkhave, sambodhā anabhisambuddho bodhisattova samāno obhāsaññeva kho sañjānāmi, no ca rūpāni passāmi.
root_text.an8.64:2.2: ‘sace kho ahaṁ obhāsañceva sañjāneyyaṁ rūpāni ca passeyyaṁ;
root_text.an8.64:2.3: evaṁ me idaṁ ñāṇadassanaṁ parisuddhataraṁ assā’ti.
root_text.an8.64:3.1: So kho ahaṁ, bhikkhave, aparena samayena appamatto ātāpī pahitatto viharanto obhāsañceva sañjānāmi, rūpāni ca passāmi;
root_text.an8.64:3.2: no ca kho tāhi devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭhāmi sallapāmi sākacchaṁ samāpajjāmi.
root_text.an8.64:4.2: ‘sace kho ahaṁ obhāsañceva sañjāneyyaṁ, rūpāni ca passeyyaṁ, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭheyyaṁ sallapeyyaṁ sākacchaṁ samāpajjeyyaṁ;
root_text.an8.64:4.3: evaṁ me idaṁ ñāṇadassanaṁ parisuddhataraṁ assā’ti.
root_text.an8.64:5.1: So kho ahaṁ, bhikkhave, aparena samayena appamatto ātāpī pahitatto viharanto obhāsañceva sañjānāmi, rūpāni ca passāmi, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭhāmi sallapāmi sākacchaṁ samāpajjāmi;
root_text.an8.64:5.2: no ca kho tā devatā jānāmi—
root_text.an8.64:5.3: imā devatā amukamhā vā amukamhā vā devanikāyāti.
root_text.an8.64:6.2: ‘sace kho ahaṁ obhāsañceva sañjāneyyaṁ, rūpāni ca passeyyaṁ, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭheyyaṁ sallapeyyaṁ sākacchaṁ samāpajjeyyaṁ, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ:
root_text.an8.64:6.3: “imā devatā amukamhā vā amukamhā vā devanikāyā”ti;
root_text.an8.64:6.4: evaṁ me idaṁ ñāṇadassanaṁ parisuddhataraṁ assā’ti.
root_text.an8.64:7.1: So kho ahaṁ, bhikkhave, aparena samayena appamatto ātāpī pahitatto viharanto obhāsañceva sañjānāmi, rūpāni ca passāmi, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭhāmi sallapāmi sākacchaṁ samāpajjāmi, tā ca devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:7.2: ‘imā devatā amukamhā vā amukamhā vā devanikāyā’ti;
root_text.an8.64:7.3: no ca kho tā devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:7.4: ‘imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena ito cutā tattha upapannā’ti …pe…
root_text.an8.64:7.6: ‘imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena ito cutā tattha upapannā’ti;
root_text.an8.64:7.7: no ca kho tā devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:7.8: ‘imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena evamāhārā evaṁsukhadukkhappaṭisaṁvediniyo’ti …pe…
root_text.an8.64:7.10: ‘imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena evamāhārā evaṁsukhadukkhappaṭisaṁvediniyo’ti;
root_text.an8.64:7.11: no ca kho tā devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:7.15: no ca kho tā devatā jānāmi yadi vā me imāhi devatāhi saddhiṁ sannivutthapubbaṁ yadi vā na sannivutthapubbanti.
root_text.an8.64:8.2: ‘sace kho ahaṁ obhāsañceva sañjāneyyaṁ, rūpāni ca passeyyaṁ, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭheyyaṁ sallapeyyaṁ sākacchaṁ samāpajjeyyaṁ, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ:
root_text.an8.64:8.3: “imā devatā amukamhā vā amukamhā vā devanikāyā”ti, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ:
root_text.an8.64:8.4: “imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena ito cutā tattha upapannā”ti, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ:
root_text.an8.64:8.5: “imā devatā evamāhārā evaṁsukhadukkhappaṭisaṁvediniyo”ti, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ:
root_text.an8.64:8.6: “imā devatā evaṁdīghāyukā evaṁciraṭṭhitikā”ti, tā ca devatā jāneyyaṁ yadi vā me imāhi devatāhi saddhiṁ sannivutthapubbaṁ yadi vā na sannivutthapubbanti;
root_text.an8.64:8.7: evaṁ me idaṁ ñāṇadassanaṁ parisuddhataraṁ assā’ti.
root_text.an8.64:9.1: So kho ahaṁ, bhikkhave, aparena samayena appamatto ātāpī pahitatto viharanto obhāsañceva sañjānāmi, rūpāni ca passāmi, tāhi ca devatāhi saddhiṁ santiṭṭhāmi sallapāmi sākacchaṁ samāpajjāmi, tā ca devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:9.2: ‘imā devatā amukamhā vā amukamhā vā devanikāyā’ti, tā ca devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:9.3: ‘imā devatā imassa kammassa vipākena ito cutā tattha upapannā’ti, tā ca devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:9.4: ‘imā devatā evamāhārā evaṁsukhadukkhappaṭisaṁvediniyo’ti, tā ca devatā jānāmi:
root_text.an8.64:9.5: ‘imā devatā evaṁdīghāyukā evaṁciraṭṭhitikā’ti, tā ca devatā jānāmi yadi vā me devatāhi saddhiṁ sannivutthapubbaṁ yadi vā na sannivutthapubbanti.
root_text.an8.64:10.1: Yāvakīvañca me, bhikkhave, evaṁ aṭṭhaparivaṭṭaṁ adhidevañāṇadassanaṁ na suvisuddhaṁ ahosi, neva tāvāhaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambuddho’ti paccaññāsiṁ.
root_text.an8.64:10.2: Yato ca kho me, bhikkhave, evaṁ aṭṭhaparivaṭṭaṁ adhidevañāṇadassanaṁ suvisuddhaṁ ahosi, athāhaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘sadevake loke samārake sabrahmake sassamaṇabrāhmaṇiyā pajāya sadevamanussāya anuttaraṁ sammāsambodhiṁ abhisambuddho’ti paccaññāsiṁ;
root_text.an8.64:10.4: akuppā me cetovimutti; ayamantimā jāti natthi dāni punabbhavo”ti.

translation_text.an8.64:1.1: At one time the Buddha was staying near Gayā on Gayā Head.
translation_text.an8.64:1.2: There the Buddha addressed the mendicants:
translation_text.an8.64:1.3: “Mendicants, before my awakening—when I was still not awake but intent on awakening—I perceived light but did not see forms.
translation_text.an8.64:2.2: ‘What if I were to both perceive light and see forms?
translation_text.an8.64:2.3: Then my knowledge and vision would become even more purified.’
translation_text.an8.64:3.1: So after some time, living diligent, keen, and resolute, I perceived light and saw forms.
translation_text.an8.64:3.2: But I didn’t associate with those deities, converse, or engage in discussion.
translation_text.an8.64:4.2: ‘What if I were to perceive light and see forms; and associate with those deities, converse, and engage in discussion?
translation_text.an8.64:4.3: Then my knowledge and vision would become even more purified.’
translation_text.an8.64:5.1: So after some time … I perceived light and saw forms. And I associated with those deities, conversed, and engaged in discussion.
translation_text.an8.64:5.3: orders of gods those deities came from.
translation_text.an8.64:6.2: ‘What if I were to perceive light and see forms; and associate with those deities, converse, and engage in discussion;
translation_text.an8.64:6.3: and find out which orders of gods those deities come from?
translation_text.an8.64:6.4: Then my knowledge and vision would become even more purified.’
translation_text.an8.64:7.1: So after some time … I perceived light and saw forms. And I associated with those deities … And I found out which orders of gods those deities came from.
translation_text.an8.64:7.4: deeds caused those deities to be reborn there after passing away from here.
translation_text.an8.64:7.5: So after some time … I found out what
translation_text.an8.64:7.6: deeds caused those deities to be reborn there after passing away from here.
translation_text.an8.64:7.8: deeds caused those deities to have such food and such an experience of pleasure and pain.
translation_text.an8.64:7.9: So after some time … I found out what
translation_text.an8.64:7.10: deeds caused those deities to have such food and such an experience of pleasure and pain.
translation_text.an8.64:7.12: these deities have a lifespan of such a length.
translation_text.an8.64:7.13: So after some time … I found out that
translation_text.an8.64:7.14: these deities have a lifespan of such a length.
translation_text.an8.64:7.15: But I didn’t know whether or not I had previously lived together with those deities.
translation_text.an8.64:8.2: ‘What if I were to perceive light and see forms; and associate with those deities, converse, and engage in discussion;
translation_text.an8.64:8.3: and find out which orders of gods those deities come from;
translation_text.an8.64:8.4: and what deeds caused those deities to be reborn there after passing away from here;
translation_text.an8.64:8.5: and what deeds caused those deities to have such food and such an experience of pleasure and pain;
translation_text.an8.64:8.6: and that these deities have a lifespan of such a length; and whether or not I have previously lived together with those deities?
translation_text.an8.64:8.7: Then my knowledge and vision would become even more purified.’
translation_text.an8.64:9.5: I found out whether or not I have previously lived together with those deities.
translation_text.an8.64:10.1: As long as my knowledge and vision about the deities was not fully purified in these eight rounds, I didn’t announce my supreme perfect awakening in this world with its gods, Māras, and Divinities, this population with its ascetics and brahmins, its gods and humans.
translation_text.an8.64:10.2: But when my knowledge and vision about the deities was fully purified in these eight rounds, I announced my supreme perfect awakening in this world with its gods, Māras, and Divinities, this population with its ascetics and brahmins, its gods and humans.
translation_text.an8.64:10.3: Knowledge and vision arose in me:
translation_text.an8.64:10.4: ‘My freedom is unshakable; this is my last rebirth; now there’ll be no more future lives.’”
